title: 100 Counts Red Heart Cocktail Sticks, Handmade Wooden Cocktail Skewers, Appetizer Fruit Finger Food Picks for Christmas Valentine's Day Mother's Day Wedding Birthday Party Decorations
features: PACKAGING: 100 cocktail sticks per pack, 12cm long
MATERIAL: Made from wooden, naturally biodegradable Sturdy and durable, not easy to break, smooth surface and comfortable to touch
CREATIVE DESIGN: A great alternative to traditional finger food skewers, instantly makes your party food more attractive
BEAUTIFUL & PRACTICA: Our cocktail skewers are great for appetizers, cupcakes, sandwiches, snacks, BBQ skewers, desserts, mini sausages and making fruit skewers

PARTY FOOD DECORATIONS: These fun and decorative bamboo skewers are perfect for birthdays, weddings, baby showers, Christmas, Valentine's Day, anniversaries, Mother's Day, Father's Day and other themed parties
description: Product Description CREATIVE COCKTAIL STICKS Product Features and Specifications Handmade from pure wooden, hope to get your favorite. Toothpick with nice decorations on the top for a beautiful novelty. Suitable for picking up foods or decorating foods, wide application. Name: Creative Food Sticks Material: Wooden Package included: 100 Pcs HEALTHY WOODEN PRODUCTS SMOOTH SURFACE WITHOUT BURRS DURABLE AND NOT EASY TO BREAK
